description_long: This object is an open-frame mining rig chassis equipped with six large graphics cards mounted horizontally in a row, each with prominent cooling fans. The frame is constructed from sturdy metal bars, providing structural support and open airflow for the electronic components. Below the graphics cards, a large power supply unit labeled 'MaxTytan' is visible, along with a motherboard and additional circuit boards. The rig is designed for high-performance computing tasks, such as cryptocurrency mining, and features visible cabling and connectors for power and data transfer. The open design allows for efficient cooling and easy access to internal components for maintenance or upgrades. The overall appearance is industrial and functional, with a focus on maximizing hardware density and cooling efficiency.
description: An open-frame mining rig with six large graphics cards, a visible power supply, and a motherboard, all mounted on a sturdy metal chassis for efficient cooling and access.
description_view_0: Front view showing six graphics cards with cooling fans and the motherboard and power supply beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of graphics cards and the 'MaxTytan' power supply label.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the graphics cards, power supply, and motherboard connections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the graphics cards' cooling fans and the open frame structure.
